---
title: "Week 11"
date: 04-14-26
description: This week looks at Word Embeddings.
editor: source
---


## Resources

| Lecture | Slides                   | Videos  | R Code Files |
|---------|--------------------------|---------|----------|
| 1       | [Slides](../lectures/11a) | [Video]() | [RNN](../lectures/R/11a.R)  |
